coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 33-node closure.
validation: Five diameter and resolution cases have exact Blender topology and local bounds. The two-cylinder hull retains one authored cap per end, the 34 exposed points from the second cylinder, 68 outer wall panels, and Blender's triangle/quad extension tessellation.

material.name: Filament PLA .02 mm layer height
material.contract: constant POINT col + Generated Z-band Wave + derivative Bump + Backfacing branch
material.residual: Blender's contrast look clips the bright neutral surface closer to white; Three.js retains more bump and side-wall shading.
